_comment: Machine-written by scripts/update_data.py after each pipeline run, and rendered on the website's Data status page. 'last_success': null means the pipeline has not yet run successfully for that source since this file was created.
pipeline_note: The pipeline runs monthly via GitHub Actions (or manually: python3 scripts/update_data.py). Until its first run, values carry their shipped manual/sample labels.

wb_wdi.name: World Bank — World Development Indicators
wb_wdi.how: World Bank Indicators API (keyless). Most recent non-null observation per indicator, up to 8 years back.

imf.name: IMF — World Economic Outlook (DataMapper API)
imf.how: IMF DataMapper public API (keyless). Latest observation up to the current year; recent WEO points may be IMF staff estimates.

unresolved.reserves_months: No keyless IMF endpoint serves 'reserves in months of imports' as one ready series; it requires IRFCL/BOP SDMX mapping plus an imports denominator. Remains manual.
unresolved.interest_rev: Interest payments as % of revenue is not a standard WEO DataMapper series; it appears in Fiscal Monitor tables without a stable machine-readable endpoint. Remains manual.

wb_wgi.name: Worldwide Governance Indicators (via World Bank API)
wb_wgi.how: WGI percentile ranks (GE.PER.RNK, RL.PER.RNK) served through the keyless World Bank API.

undp_hdr.name: UNDP — Human Development Report
undp_hdr.how: Downloads and parses UNDP's complete-time-series CSV. The CSV URL is pinned per HDR edition; when a new report is released, one line in scripts/update_data.py (HDR_CSV_URL) must be updated.

oec.name: Observatory of Economic Complexity
oec.how: OEC bulk/API access now requires a registered (paid) token, so this source is NOT automated. Top export products, destinations and the Economic Complexity Index remain manually transcribed from public profile pages and are labeled 'manual_approx'.

un_comtrade.name: UN Comtrade (optional)
un_comtrade.how: If a free registered key is provided as the COMTRADE_API_KEY secret, the pipeline computes top export products, top destinations and export concentration (HHI) from real Comtrade flows, replacing the manual OEC transcriptions. The site never depends on this.
